summary: Large grcastle decompilation PR for the Ground/stage subsystem. It added many grCastle function bodies, expanded castle-specific structs and union fields, adjusted grcastle prototypes, and made small lb_00F9 signature/source updates. The bot report recorded 16 new matched grcastle items and 9 unmatched-item improvements. Human discussion focused on an inline asm rlwimi use guarded by MWERKS_GEKKO, which ribbanya said was not concerning at that time.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; added grCastle function bodies, local structs/tables, includes, fielded access, matching tactics, and inline asm guarded by MWERKS_GEKKO.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grcastle.c added 1447 deleted 55 hunks 21
raw_diff: grcastle.c includes and grCastleParams/grCastle_* struct additions
raw_diff: placeholders replaced for grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CDA0C, grCastle_801CDC44, grCastle_801CE054, grCastle_801CE19C, grCastle_801CE260, grCastle_801CE3AC, grCastle_801CE578
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists grcastle matched-code progress

key_files.role: Ground/stage type surface expanded for castle-specific fields and structs.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/types.h added 109 deleted 0 hunks 3
raw_diff: grcastle.c accesses gp->gv.castle8, castle9, castle11, castle3, castle4, castle5 typed fields

key_files.role: Small library header signature adjustment paired with lb_00F9.c.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.h added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1

what_changed.text: Replaced multiple grcastle placeholders with C bodies, including functions reported as 100% matched by the bot such as grCastle_801CEACC, grCastle_801CE578, grCastle_801D0D84, grCastle_801D02B8, grCastle_801CDA0C, grCastle_801CF0F4, grCastle_801CEF04, grCastle_801D0BBC, grCastle_801CE054, grCastle_801CE260, grCastle_801CE8E8, grCastle_801D09B8, grCastle_801CE9E8, grCastle_801CE19C, grCastle_801D0B0C, and grCastle_801CD8A8.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, 16 new matches

what_changed.text: Improved additional unmatched grcastle items, including grCastle_801CFBD4, grCastle_801CF308, grCastle_801CDC44, grCastle_801CF868, grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CE3AC, plus .rodata/.sdata2/.sdata progress.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, 9 improvements in unmatched items

what_changed.text: Expanded grCastleParams from coarse padding/unknown array into many explicit scalar fields, a fixed x12C array, and a grCastleParams_Entry array containing a Vec3 rot.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastleParams_Entry and grCastleParams struct diff

what_changed.text: Introduced grcastle-local table wrapper structs and static data for quaternion, blink table, dynamic entries, y offsets, weights, target entries, and a Vec3 position.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_BlinkTable, grCastle_DynEntries, grCastle_YOffsets, grCastle_WeightTable, grCastle_TargetTable, grCs_803B7EB8, grCs_803B7E9C additions

what_changed.text: Converted some raw Ground byte/halfword offset accesses into typed gv.castle* fields, for example gp->gv.castle9.xDE and xD4/xD6/xD8/xDA/xDC in grCastle_801CDFD8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 replaces ((u8*) gp)[0xDE] and *(s16*)((u8*)gp+offset) with gp->gv.castle9 fields

what_changed.text: Added guarded inline asm rlwimi sequences for castle flag bit updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 and grCastle_801CE19C use asm { rlwimi ... } under #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO
human_pr_text: PsiLupan and ribbanya comments about inline asm for rlwimi

smart_moves.text: Recovered typed Ground union accesses instead of leaving byte-offset writes in at least part of the grcastle code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 field replacements

smart_moves.text: Used small local data wrapper structs for repeated table shapes, making arrays such as dynamics entries and target pairs more reviewable than anonymous scalar blobs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_DynEntry/grCastle_DynEntries and grCastle_TargetEntry/grCastle_TargetTable additions

smart_moves.text: Kept the inline asm narrow and guarded by MWERKS_GEKKO rather than unconditional for all builds.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO around rlwimi asm
human_pr_text: ribbanya comment says the inline asm is surrounded in #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a Ground union layout is recovered enough, replacing raw offsets with the correct gv.castle* fields can land alongside function matching and makes later stage work easier to review.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: raw gp offset writes replaced by gp->gv.castle9 fields
changed_files.jsonl: types.h expanded by 109 lines

decomp_lessons.lesson: Stage parameter blobs can often be refined incrementally into offset-annotated structs with fixed arrays and nested entries as functions reveal access patterns.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastleParams changed from mostly padding and flexible x12C[] TODO to explicit fields, entries[9], and x12C[4]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bot match reports are useful intake evidence for which functions became exact matches, but the PR slice does not include local build commands or objdiff details beyond the report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 with 16 new matches and 9 improvements

naming_conventions.text: New local grcastle helper/data types use the grCastle_ prefix with descriptive suffixes for table shape or role, such as grCastleParams_Entry, grCastle_DynEntry, grCastle_DynEntries, grCastle_YOffsets, grCastle_WeightTable, grCastle_TargetEntry, and grCastle_TargetTable.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef additions in grcastle.c

naming_conventions.text: Unknown global/static symbols retained address-style grCs_ names rather than speculative semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCs_803B7EB8, grCs_803B7EC8, grCs_803B7E9C, grCs_803B7EA8, grCs_803B7F50, grCs_803B7EF0, grCs_803B7EFC additions

naming_conventions.text: Locals often use short role names where clear, such as gp, gobj, jobj, archive, flag3/flag4/flag6, pos, and subject; some generated-looking locals remain in the excerpt, such as new_var/new_var2/new_var3/new_var4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CE260, grCastle_801CE578 excerpts

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Guarded inline asm for rlwimi bit insertion on a castle flag byte.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: asm { rlwimi byte, one, 7, 24, 24 } in grCastle_801CDFD8
raw_diff: asm { rlwimi byte, zero, 7, 24, 24 } in grCastle_801CE19C
human_pr_text: inline asm was explicitly discussed
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Current standards treat inline assembly as exceptional; the PR evidence shows reviewer tolerance for this instance because of the MWERKS_GEKKO guard, not a global endorsement.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around grCastle_801CDF54 and added a grCastle_801CE3AC_dontinline wrapper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pragma block around grCastle_801CDF54
raw_diff: grCastle_801CE3AC_dontinline definition
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice does not include reviewer discussion or verifier rationale for these pragmas/wrappers.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in several recovered functions and an explicit dummy stack-allocation-looking loop in grCastle_801CE578.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8) in grCastle_801CE19C and grCastle_801CE260
raw_diff: PAD_STACK(4) in grCastle_801CE3AC
raw_diff: grCastle_801CE578 contains unsigned char _[44] in a do-while block
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR slice shows these tactics in code, but does not provide separate objdiff justification beyond the bot progress report.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used header-style JObj operations such as HSD_JObjSetTranslateY, HSD_JObjSetTranslate, and HSD_JObjSetRotation, but also introduced a fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate inline that manually asserts jobj.h line numbers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObjSetTranslateY calls in grCastle_801CDA0C and grCastle_801CDC44
raw_diff: fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate inline with HSD_ASSERT(916/917) and #define __FILE__ "jobj.h"
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The fake inline is evidence of a matching tactic, not an accepted style recommendation.

Several matching tactics are visible in the diff, but their individual necessity is not documented in the loaded PR text.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover stage Ground union fields as functions expose offsets
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2357 shows grcastle matching work replacing raw Ground offset accesses with typed gv.castle* fields after expanding the Ground/type surface. This supports a local lesson: when stage behavior reveals a Ground union layout, prefer typed castle fields over raw byte/halfword pointer math.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 offset accesses converted to gp->gv.castle9 fields
changed_files.jsonl: gr/types.h added 109 lines

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep exceptional inline asm narrow and compiler-guarded
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2357 included rlwimi inline asm under MWERKS_GEKKO guards. The only human discussion says the guard made the reviewer not worried at the time. This is a candidate historical example of narrowly scoped inline asm tolerance, not a general style rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MWERKS_GEKKO-guarded rlwimi asm
human_pr_text: PsiLupan and ribbanya comments

source_update_candidates.title: grcastle PR #2357 touched stage code and related Ground/lb headers
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2357 primarily modified src/melee/gr/grcastle.c, with related updates in src/melee/gr/types.h, src/melee/gr/grcastle.h, src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c, and src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.h.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl
source_update_candidates.reason: May help future path-scoped searches for grcastle stage decomp work and related type/header edits.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify historical handling of guarded inline asm in matching PRs
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2357 contains MWERKS_GEKKO-guarded rlwimi inline asm and a reviewer comment that this guard made it acceptable at the time. Curator should decide whether this belongs as a cautionary historical example under avoid-pragmas-register-asm rather than as a new permissive rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: guarded rlwimi asm
human_pr_text: ribbanya response
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards already discourage inline asm except as a tightly scoped exception; this PR provides concrete review evidence for one guarded exception.

rejection_notes: Do not promote fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate, manual jobj.h assert expansion, PAD_STACK, dummy stack arrays, or dont_inline wrappers as accepted global style from this PR alone; the slice lacks individual verifier rationale.
Do not infer reviewer approval of all matching tactics from merge status or the single inline-asm discussion.
Do not claim complete grcastle text/data matching; the bot report shows some exact matches and several partial improvements, including incomplete .rodata/.sdata2/.sdata progress.
